families.AUTHORITY: Stop caused by forbidden authority or undeclared input dependency.
families.BASE_RUNNER: Mechanical runner stop or shape failure.
families.EXTRACTION_PRESSURE: Stop caused by missing bounded extraction/dependency material.
families.FRONTIER: Stop caused by frontier material not encoded/promoted.
families.GATE: Stop caused by declared acceptance gate failure.
families.LAYERING: Stop caused by collapsing object, layer, consumer, or authority roles.
families.PROJECTION: Stop caused by read-only projection/readout misreporting coherent underlying trace/receipt.
families.TAXONOMY_PRESSURE: Stop caused by inadequate or missing typed vocabulary/move surface; record-only in v0.
